archetype: Automated Glacier Lake Outburst Flood Risk Assessment and Early Warning System
description: This system assesses the risk of glacial lake outburst floods (GLOFs) in mountainous regions and provides early warnings to downstream communities. It uses satellite imagery, sensor data, and machine learning algorithms to monitor lake water levels, glacier calving, and other factors. The system must accurately predict the likelihood of a GLOF and issue timely warnings to prevent loss of life and property.
rules: MUST integrate with satellite imagery providers (e.g., Sentinel-2, Landsat 8) to obtain high-resolution images of glaciers and lakes
MUST comply with the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) 31000 risk management standard for GLOF risk assessment
MUST incorporate data from in-situ sensors (e.g., water level, temperature, and precipitation sensors) to validate model outputs
MUST use machine learning algorithms (e.g., random forest, support vector machines) to analyze historical data and predict GLOF likelihood
MUST provide early warnings to downstream communities via SMS, email, and social media platforms
anti_patterns: DO NOT rely solely on historical data for GLOF prediction, as glacier dynamics and climate change can alter risk profiles
DO NOT neglect to consider the social and economic impacts of GLOF warnings on downstream communities
DO NOT underestimate the complexity of integrating satellite and sensor data from diverse sources
key_technical_challenges: Handling large volumes of satellite imagery and sensor data for real-time processing and analysis
Developing accurate machine learning models for GLOF prediction, considering the complexity of glaciological and hydrological processes
Ensuring reliable and timely communication of early warnings to downstream communities

recommended_stack.language: Python + extensive libraries for satellite image processing, machine learning, and data analysis
recommended_stack.framework: Flask + lightweight and flexible for real-time data processing and API development
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostGIS + spatial database capabilities for efficient storage and analysis of geospatial data
recommended_stack.cache: Redis + in-memory caching for fast data access and processing
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ + message queuing for reliable communication between system components
special_services: Machine learning model training service (e.g., TensorFlow)

compliance_flags: UNDRR Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction
